title: Rearrest after discharge
doc_html:
Art. 367.  Rearrest after discharge

A person discharged from custody in a habeas corpus proceeding may be rearrested if a legal ground exists therefor.
doc_text:
Art. 367.  Rearrest after discharge
A person discharged from custody in a habeas corpus proceeding may be rearrested if a legal ground exists therefor.
